evidence.snippet: All mechanical, electronic and software elements are fully integrated and suitable for fin or canard control applications and are designed to achieve high slew rates under high loads in extreme environments.

items.notes: Control Actuation Systems (CAS) are electromechanical actuation assemblies (motors, gearboxes, ECUs) for fin/canard control on UAVs, missiles, and other platforms

items.name: Multi-Function Valve (MFV)
items.product_type: pressure/flow regulator and isolation valve for satellite propulsion

evidence.snippet:
### _The Patented Multi-Function Valve Can Save Up to 50% on Weight and Cost_
Montville, New Jersey (January 21, 2015) – Marotta Controls announces that its patented high performance miniature **[Multi-Function Valve](https://marotta.com/products/flow-controls/pressure-controls/)** (MFV) is now available as an **ITAR-Free** key component for satellite [electric propulsion](http://www.marotta.com/markets/space/satellite-propulsion-controls/) systems.

products.notes: Many additional named products (Dual Pressure Controller, Delta-V In-Space Propulsion, Cold Gas Microthrusters) exist on skipped pages

evidence.snippet: Marotta Controls’ Patented Multi-Function Technology Now ITAR-Free

ndaa.notes: Site claims ITAR-Free status for MFV but no mention of NDAA Section 848/889 compliance in the corpus

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS mention anywhere in the fetched corpus

evidence.snippet: The initial shipments call for 30+ units per month, a quantity that is expected to increase to 300+ units by mid-2023. Marotta Control’s production facility easily supports this volume and has capacity to quickly scale to meet more than two times that demand.

readiness.notes: CAS in serial production at 30+ units/month scaling to 300+/month by mid-2023; catalog SKUs listed across product pages

tagline: Designs and manufactures electromechanical actuation systems, flow controls, pneumatic compression, and power electronics for missile, UAV, and aerospace platforms. Core products include Control Actuation Systems for flight/thrust-vector control, MPACT® pneumatic compressor systems, CoRe® solenoid valves, and ruggedized motor controllers. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence confirms production-ready subsystems across tactical and space markets; limited transparency on specific platform integrations or current defense contracts.
